title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST
category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist

items.question: Clean inside and outside the die, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Switch on power supply.
Check the line air pressure
Machine Air Pressure
Released a emergency botton
Check PM status of Workstation/Machine (Cycle:Monthly)
Check the PM status of running model tool / fixture (Should be within due date mentioned)
Availability of rejection bin/ Rework trolley/Identification tags ( Red/Yellow/Green)
Calibration of instruments
Wear personal protective equipments (PPE)

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Safety Light Curtain Press Cycle start button of machine, When ram is moving down cut the Light Curtain, Machine has to stop in between.If machine gets stop means POKAYOKE is working, if not inform to maintenance.

Sealing Frame no fold in Header Put the job inside the machine without checking of the crimping sealing resting by levelling stick  press start button machine will not start Remove the job and check sealing resting by levelling stick and again put the complete assembly job inside of the machine press start button machine will run.

Part missing (Wheel crimping) Put the job inside the machine without tank assembly and try to start machine, Machine will start but wheel not getting forward and cycle automatically reset at home position. Now put complete assembly with tank inside the machine and try to start the machine, Machine should start and wheel getting move forward and cycle will complete

Wrong Tank or Orientation of Tank for S201/S215 (Wheel crimping) OK Case - Put the Job with Wrong Orientation or with Wrong Tank and Start the Cycle ,Camera detect the Wrong Tank and Cycle will not Start and Wrong Tank Assembly Alarm Pop Up on Screen.
Not OK Case - Put the Job with Correct Orientation or with correct Tank and Start the Cycle ,Camera detect the correct Tank and Cycle will Start
Clean inside and outside the die, Tool & Working area, oil spillage.
Removal and record of rejection
Switch off power supply

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question: Safety Light Curtain Press Cycle start button of machine, When ram is moving down cut the Light Curtain, Machine has to stop in between.If machine gets stop means POKAYOKE is working, if not inform to maintenance.

Sealing Frame no fold in Header Put the job inside the machine without checking of the crimping sealing resting by levelling stick  press start button machine will not start Remove the job and check sealing resting by levelling stick and again put the complete assembly job inside of the machine press start button machine will run.

Part missing (Wheel crimping) Put the job inside the machine without tank assembly and try to start machine, Machine will start but wheel not getting forward and cycle automatically reset at home position. Now put complete assembly with tank inside the machine and try to start the machine, Machine should start and wheel getting move forward and cycle will complete

Wrong Tank or Orientation of Tank For S201/S215 (Wheel crimping) OK Case - Put the Job with Wrong Orientation or with Wrong Tank and Start the Cycle ,Camera detect the Wrong Tank and Cycle will not Start and Wrong Tank Assembly Alarm Pop Up on Screen.
Not OK Case - Put the Job with Correct Orientation or with correct Tank and Start the Cycle ,Camera detect the correct Tank and Cycle will Start

closing_fields.label: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR

notes: FORM:- START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

A)Condition for StartUp :-
1] At Start of shift /End of shift
2] Model &/or Set up change
3] Pokayoke Failure, corrected & production resumed
4] If poka yoke bypassed and production continued as per alternate poka yoke bypass document
5] More than 4 hour Planned shut down
6) During Abnormal Situations (6a-Emergency Alarm / 6b-Power Failure /
 6c-Machine or Tool Breakdown - more than 45 mins /
 6d-Inspection Guage or Instrument breakdown or fallen down)
B)Reactivity Rule:- If any NC is found inform to CC/ Shift Incharge , Initiate actions for correction & After closure of NC treat the shift as a fresh shift , Start checking from the begining of the check points in the next column.
C) Guideline for Supervisor's Approval: Supervisor need to do tick mark ( √ ) after verification of highlighted points.
